title: auto-conversion of string to `sht` type no longer works
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (a VARCHAR(100), b SMALLINT);
INSERT INTO test (a, b) VALUES ('0.10', CAST(0 AS UNSIGNED));
INSERT INTO test (a, b) VALUES ('9999.00', CAST(9999 AS UNSIGNED));
UPDATE test SET b = NULL WHERE a = '0.10';
SELECT * FROM test WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: auto-conversion of string to sht type
